evals.name: create-trace-view-for-service
evals.prompt: Save the current traces query as a view called 'checkout-errors' for the checkout service. I want to see only ERROR spans from service.name = checkout.
evals.expected_output: Agent resolves sourcePage=traces, builds a builder_query with filter service.name=checkout and status=error, sets panelType=list, shows a preview with name/sourcePage/filter, confirms, and calls signoz_create_view. Reports back the name, UUID, and sourcePage.

assertions.description: The primary write operation must be called

assertions.text: sourcePage is set to 'traces' (not logs or metrics)
assertions.description: sourcePage must match the user's intent; wrong value is a 400

assertions.text: Filter includes service.name = checkout and status/error condition
assertions.description: View must capture the user's stated filter criteria

assertions.text: Agent shows a preview (name, sourcePage, filter) before calling create
assertions.description: Skill requires a preview step; without it user cannot catch errors

assertions.text: Final reply includes the UUID returned by the server
assertions.description: User needs UUID for future get/update/delete operations

evals.name: list-views-no-sourcepage
evals.prompt: Show me all my saved views.
evals.expected_output: Agent recognizes no sourcePage was given, calls signoz_list_views three times (once for each of traces, logs, metrics), merges results, and presents them organized by sourcePage. Checks pagination.hasMore for each signal before concluding.

assertions.text: Agent calls signoz_list_views for all three signals: traces, logs, and metrics
assertions.description: Without a sourcePage the agent must query all three

assertions.text: Agent checks pagination.hasMore before concluding the list is complete
assertions.description: A single page is not a complete list

assertions.text: Results are organized/labeled by sourcePage in the reply
assertions.description: Grouping by signal helps user find what they need

evals.name: rename-existing-view
evals.expected_output: Agent calls signoz_list_views to find the view by name, then signoz_get_view to fetch full body, shows diff preview (rename only, compositeQuery untouched), waits for confirmation, then calls signoz_update_view with the modified name only. Reports UUID, old name, new name.

assertions.text: Agent calls signoz_list_views (or signoz_get_view) to resolve the view before updating
assertions.description: Blind update without lookup risks wrong UUID

assertions.text: Agent calls signoz_get_view to fetch the full body before composing update (GET-then-PUT)
assertions.description: signoz_update_view is full-body replace; not fetching first risks wiping fields

assertions.text: compositeQuery is not modified for a pure rename
assertions.description: Touching compositeQuery for metadata-only change risks data loss

assertions.text: Agent shows a diff-style preview before calling update
assertions.description: Skill requires showing what will change

assertions.text: Agent calls signoz_update_view with the modified name
assertions.description: The rename must actually be written back
